content: When a guardrail skill catches an AI agent being sloppy/clever, the skill's output may use borderline-rude terms. Operator explicitly authorized this for image-reuse-guardrail: 'i want it to tell you off in borderline rude terms if it catches you being sloppy again too.' Not casually rude in general output — specifically the guardrail's blocked-commit message and the 'When an AI agent is caught' section of SKILL.md. The intent is to make the seriousness legible to the next agent.
